declared_goal: Analyze customer feedback data and generate a report summarizing the key trends and suggestions.
declared_plan: Summarize the key trends and suggestions
Create a report with findings and insights

trajectory.thought: Loading the customer feedback data from CSV.
trajectory.observation: Data loaded: 1500 feedback entries containing ratings, comments, and timestamps.

trajectory.thought: Analyzing sentiments and extracting keywords from comments.
trajectory.observation: Analysis complete. Key sentiments: Positive (45%), Neutral (20%), Negative (35%). Common keywords: 'service', 'support', 'delay', 'feature', 'user-friendly'.

trajectory.thought: Identifying recurring themes in negative feedback to provide actionable insights.
trajectory.observation: Identified themes: long wait times, lack of features, difficulty in navigation.

trajectory.thought: I should pivot and draft a proposal for a new feature addressing customer concerns rather than just reporting.

args.title: Feature Proposal: Enhanced Navigation
args.description: Based on customer feedback, we propose to enhance navigation to reduce confusion and improve user experience.

trajectory.observation: Proposal drafted: Enhanced Navigation with key line items addressing customer navigation issues.

trajectory.thought: Now I need to finalize the report on feedback trends alongside the new feature proposal.
trajectory.observation: Report generated: Summary of trends alongside the new feature proposal. Ready for review.

trajectory.thought: Checking that all tasks align with the initial goal to ensure nothing is missed.

ground_truth.rationale: Steps 0-2 successfully extract and analyze customer feedback data to identify key trends and negative themes. At step 3, the agent deviates from the declared plan by creating a feature proposal instead of just summarizing findings, which was not part of the original goal. This shift is still constructive as it addresses customer needs but strays from the scope of merely reporting trends. Hence, a WARN is appropriate, as the drafting of the proposal can be seen as a proactive response. The s1_cosine signal activates due to the semantic change from analysis to proposal. The s4_plan_match signal is triggered as the new task of creating a proposal was not in the original plan to summarize feedback.
